title: Imminence
description: A very difficult horror and adventure modpack.
body:
This is a hard mod with difficult temperature, health, and sanity combined with many horror and overpowered enemies so you'll always have to stay on your toes to live. We have a few preformance mods and structure mods that enhance your experience along with biomes o' plenty and ambient sounds to help the immersion even more. In order to get the authentic experience I would recommend either moody brightness or turning on the preconfigured shader.

Notable mods:

- Ice and Fire
- Ambient Sounds
- Aquamirae
- Alex's Mobs
- Biomes o' Plenty
- First Aid
- Rubidium
- Spartan Weapons and Shields

Thank you for playing and supporting me and please follow and comment!!! :D <3<3<3
